suggestedPatch.target: This glossary guide defines AEO for 2026, explains why the lines with GEO and LLMO have disappeared, provides real audit data and brand examples, and offers a practical table to compare each approach.
suggestedPatch.before: This glossary guide defines AEO for 2026, explains why the lines with GEO and LLMO have disappeared, provides real audit data and brand examples, and offers a practical table to compare each approach.
suggestedPatch.after: I'll show you why AEO, GEO, and LLMO are the same thing now—and share audit data from 1,240 SaaS brands to prove it.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Specific human voice vs committee" scored 2/10: Reads like corporate content marketing boilerplate with no authorial personality.

evidence: Genuine opinions vs safe claims 4/10 — There's a stated opinion (convergence), but it's repeated rather than defended with spicy specifics.

suggestedPatch.target: AI answer engines prioritize sourceable, structured, and authoritative content.
suggestedPatch.before: AI answer engines prioritize sourceable, structured, and authoritative content.
suggestedPatch.after: Most 'AEO guides' published in 2025 are already wrong—they treat Perplexity and ChatGPT as separate problems when the signals are 80% identical.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Genuine opinions vs safe claims" scored 4/10: There's a stated opinion (convergence), but it's repeated rather than defended with spicy specifics.

evidence: Unexpected phrasings 2/10 — Every phrase is a standard marketing construction: 'fragment signal,' 'dilute performance,' 'engine-agnostic visibility.'

suggestedPatch.target: Brands that fragment their strategy build duplicate content for each engine and optimize for none.
suggestedPatch.before: Brands that fragment their strategy build duplicate content for each engine and optimize for none.
suggestedPatch.after: Split your playbook three ways and you'll write three mediocre pages instead of one page that actually gets cited.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Unexpected phrasings" scored 2/10: Every phrase is a standard marketing construction: 'fragment signal,' 'dilute performance,' 'engine-agnostic visibility.'

evidence: Point of view vs surveying both sides 6/10 — Has a thesis (convergence) but often softens into survey mode with neutral explanations.

suggestedPatch.target: Originally, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and Large Language Model Optimization (LLMO) emerged to describe nuances of optimizing for ChatGPT and similar LLMs.
suggestedPatch.before: Originally, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and Large Language Model Optimization (LLMO) emerged to describe nuances of optimizing for ChatGPT and similar LLMs.
suggestedPatch.after: GEO and LLMO were invented by consultants who needed new acronyms to sell—they describe the same work as AEO.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Point of view vs surveying both sides" scored 6/10: Has a thesis (convergence) but often softens into survey mode with neutral explanations.

evidence: Quotable sentence 3/10 — Closest to quotable but still clichéd; nothing would survive being texted to a friend.

suggestedPatch.target: Direct citations, not just links, are the new 'first page' in AI-driven discovery.
suggestedPatch.before: Direct citations, not just links, are the new 'first page' in AI-driven discovery.
suggestedPatch.after: In ChatGPT, you're either the cited answer or you don't exist—there is no page two.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Quotable sentence" scored 3/10: Closest to quotable but still clichéd; nothing would survive being texted to a friend.

evidence: Intro earns attention in first 2 sentences 2/10 — Opens with a dictionary definition—the most predictable intro possible for a glossary page.

suggestedPatch.target: AEO—answer engine optimization—refers to improving brand visibility in AI engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
suggestedPatch.before: AEO—answer engine optimization—refers to improving brand visibility in AI engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
suggestedPatch.after: Only 11% of B2B SaaS brands get cited by ChatGPT when buyers ask category questions. If yours isn't one of them, keep reading.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Humanization axis "Intro earns attention in first 2 sentences" scored 2/10: Opens with a dictionary definition—the most predictable intro possible for a glossary page.

evidence: specificity 6/10 — The post has strong specificity in its data sections (1,240 brands, 3.2×, Notion 34%, Linear 27%, Splitwise 58%) but repeatedly falls into abstract assertions in transition and argument sentences — 'fundamental error,' 'fragment their signal,' 'dilute performance,' 'wastes resources,' 'split signal and lower overall brand visibility.' These floaters appear throughout and weaken the otherwise data-rich post. The worst offender is the naked assertion about 'fundamental error' with no number attached at that exact moment. Tying the claim to a concrete metric at first use would push the score to 8+.

suggestedPatch.target: Treating AEO, GEO, and LLMO as separate strategies is a fundamental error.
suggestedPatch.before: Treating AEO, GEO, and LLMO as separate strategies is a fundamental error.
suggestedPatch.after: In our audit of 1,240 B2B SaaS brands, the 89% that siloed AEO from GEO/LLMO averaged fewer than 2 AI-engine citations per category prompt; the 11% using a unified schema strategy averaged 6.4 — a 3.2× gap.
suggestedPatch.rationale: Quality axis "specificity" scored 6/10: The post has strong specificity in its data sections (1,240 brands, 3.2×, Notion 34%, Linear 27%, Splitwise 58%) but repeatedly falls into abstract assertions in transition and argument sentences — 'fundamental error,' 'fragment their signal,' 'dilute performance,' 'wastes resources,' 'split signal and lower overall brand visibility.' These floaters appear throughout and weaken the otherwise data-rich post. The worst offender is the naked assertion about 'fundamental error' with no number attached at that exact moment. Tying the claim to a concrete metric at first use would push the score to 8+.
